channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-3198] conf-sanity test_32b: @@@@@@ FAIL: sha1sum verification failed
item.description:
CMD: client-19vm3 test -f /tmp/t32/sha1sums
CMD: client-19vm3 cat /tmp/t32/sha1sums
/tmp/t32/mnt/lustre /usr/lib64/lustre/tests
find: `./rc6.d': Numerical result out of range
find: `./rc': Numerical result out of range
find: `./rc1.d': Numerical result out of range
find: `./rc5.d': Numerical result out of range
find: `./rc3.d': Numerical result out of range
find: `./init.d': Numerical result out of range
find: `./rc.local': Numerical result out of range
find: `./rc4.d': Numerical result out of range
find: `./t32_qf_old': Numerical result out of range
find: `./rc.sysinit': Numerical result out of range
find: `./rc0.d': Numerical result out of range
find: `./rc2.d': Numerical result out of range
/usr/lib64/lustre/tests
— /tmp/t32/sha1sums.orig 2013-04-20 23:42:22.000000000 -0700
+++ /tmp/t32/sha1sums 2013-04-20 23:42:22.000000000 -0700
@@ -1,76 +0,0 @@
-e7052caf339c810a3aca0fc6a6b01bdd7ab84a86 ./init.d/abrtd
-dd86503e97f234d415946817e4cc7e1dca9f075a ./init.d/acpid
-f0ee81e638c4972a34ba9923aa669ccbc0a2fce0 ./init.d/atd
-33d65af220cc0f3be50c04af6a4288161ae8c6d5 ./init.d/auditd
-dd8c123756fbdbc3a9109d1755288378359a5bba ./init.d/autofs
-21dbdf26ff113ffb6a9d8d1b87a830dba3f4b52a ./init.d/avahi-daemon
-8d9ebc59ba525079b63a5b54437d382ff08e33ea ./init.d/bluetooth
-8ce6aee78f24760a293a10ddc819ab3f7605cd43 ./init.d/certmonger
-352298eab12e4b094fcf36d13aa7f94f4a38cb67 ./init.d/cgconfig
-f1d7b11ee6a65b667d622ee96bf1d9debb9cc424 ./init.d/cgred
-b0aac1ceba76062a00b67e3522d8d4accf4f94ce ./init.d/cpuspeed
-93e079b265da04aadff5f927eee6a790cf6f5d28 ./init.d/crond
-3a721f57f32c61851475153503a1fec78455777d ./init.d/cups
-cd5d59498cf0236e66d8f88c6f09fdd5f8b383c8 ./init.d/dkms_autoinstaller
-5f2b3be509a3f524c5f52a4b61b56f8f457d93d7 ./init.d/dnsmasq
-90fd7fcff429892313cfa7b455182374d0fdef8d ./init.d/ebtables
-85e6c195a43f0dc92b7e051adaa494093d24c4eb ./init.d/firstboot
-29caa396d97a609a5656fabf6a5995370a526b6f ./init.d/functions
-ade12c74f65e88f060dcf68ca7db17b3642396d4 ./init.d/haldaemon
-2ea92731331b5f4eddfd52a13fa8404dcf0a5121 ./init.d/halt
-c47697b1e30f0e31165bc17e6a379172e77c974a ./init.d/hsqldb
-033f1fa2a13c103015047c740c18aaa9a29038a2 ./init.d/httpd
-7fc852dc7a3ad097f4739d8c9a2fd6fef820bf82 ./init.d/ip6tables
-43317b669f5e59e4c29023df9738ed64689466cb ./init.d/iptables
-e310129ae93f74ab3a960169e6034a1baaa53c68 ./init.d/irqbalance
-96ed0454c7ac92f385e1c5eb9d410501a0ff17b0 ./init.d/iscsi
-8b6472f88bf6e3a701909f2c5b7058a852645b15 ./init.d/iscsid
-847c0e051a1a3540ed7ee0068075c18dbbcd512f ./init.d/kdump
-065724e3f776c7896d73856cf45da45a4453013f ./init.d/killall
-4a9d7953505ae15f00e284945bbb42668e710f71 ./init.d/ksm
-d6dd17f6bdd94665f8490d8270ac28914bdd6cda ./init.d/ksmtuned
-e76d243327ce64c84103f166ac23a6c5282aa276 ./init.d/libvirtd
-a5a61897e667b732177d96a6648cdb388bcc8dbf ./init.d/libvirt-guests
-117e113c41ea2ad217609e33bf47fc7196c72204 ./init.d/lvm2-monitor
-2cc4b78792ca9410fb1541bd660b31e146fd2155 ./init.d/mdmonitor
-6d1b6f10d0fb145e9747b7b9ff30a041d5181a4f ./init.d/messagebus
-71a754af6df4729d08bd256092e39432c35c88a8 ./init.d/microcode_ctl
-b80035a2634a3b11d4824921a375e36cd7e80771 ./init.d/netconsole
-e9880ff15608dc62b952ada170f1936003ea9382 ./init.d/netfs
-8e55bf150e851454020cb09664b5e13ee078183b ./init.d/network
-be3d9a7212864151b28baed4cfd09862b22d1dea ./init.d/NetworkManager
-bd2bae2dda22c515da8a1e700de32bc751c2c84e ./init.d/nfs
-c92b0c6c96751b7ed5a8ea8787bc50f983d41b86 ./init.d/nfslock
-73e95c3d31c3cff23fea6f89ed9dd96047277221 ./init.d/nscd
-aa8ea74254f4d1b8d74d59afe05d71d7cef73504 ./init.d/nslcd
-fd20869746560ed347734245ede6da85a3d207aa ./init.d/ntpd
-e9c0af7b8157a2aa4ab2db975a240f3d22342c52 ./init.d/ntpdate
-d43ffb1db6bf67fc835e0845a5559b26ff2b4bc8 ./init.d/oddjobd
-4fe40a9e5ad7ccc31426e8f833b111ec7dac536b ./init.d/portreserve
-2f44a73e8415c0fe325d760bbf79e4caf92671cd ./init.d/postfix
-9e33181c6625b657c7175029884b35ac04558d3c ./init.d/psacct
-b401ee80e86e57e361b26e8437c528ae9a112a11 ./init.d/rdisc
-cb92bfa1ca61832a6d5e8fc115ab99a54515d932 ./init.d/restorecond
-50f83e39aec26d7ee3ddace4fee8c1d376db480f ./init.d/rhnsd
-0bbd39c1f2e3075a3a4abc5982335441ffaecf44 ./init.d/rpcbind
-0ba3db92a47f06b8eb7d9434cee2710856a639d7 ./init.d/rpcgssd
-8e19e3f2ed4061debd0c2226e1f65c18ecc21045 ./init.d/rpcidmapd
-95223d4c7f4956e508ed31321afa84648c167c91 ./init.d/rpcsvcgssd
-c3d5ec257186fab2d8d09c5be9bdf4e0019d7d0a ./init.d/rsyslog
-5e1777faae6dc777b1916f57d3c4f6064af98294 ./init.d/sandbox
-1d534cbb403922029637a6b88dd411d5b7471d2e ./init.d/saslauthd
-716e80a674b2b7b9212d8290d74267959fc9a844 ./init.d/single
-2b4fba90e9f13939fb873311608f4156bf75ff48 ./init.d/smartd
-963ef5ac16293915882f0716950daca80bde8298 ./init.d/snmpd
-193933a27cf388c303f93786956f8043341cfdf9 ./init.d/snmptrapd
-e057b048d46e10627cb1c2d004c13366996d1498 ./init.d/sshd
-5d8bc06694e7f3f56e35a3947a9976f94b0c6bff ./init.d/sssd
-3448a184194617b82968eb15398099e95a7e232c ./init.d/sysstat
-40dd23b9e075a9e262554a351ff119c368494528 ./init.d/udev-post
-e228b4d3043d636927c17336e8c18bc366ff3988 ./init.d/wpa_supplicant
-125983a6a32880b241c955442c8c8d12d4d61ed7 ./init.d/ypbind
-5f6f7d8d4a494d8de896bb2a57db7b4b45783cca ./init.d/zfs
-13f1f5cbdd760f1e325fd1d43de0a66a3448eb2f ./rc
-d312491b8247e897d708407543b5369d12e0da7c ./rc.local
-d2790542e9647c9c80f1964e2a53546f8688eb24 ./rc.sysinit
-8c206a1a87599f532ce68675536f0b1546900d7a ./t32_qf_old
conf-sanity test_32b: @@@@@@ FAIL: sha1sum verification failed

https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/715a5d1e-aaf7-11e2-a7ad-52540035b04c
https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/8f444ca8-ab0c-11e2-8272-52540035b04c
https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/7319dbd0-aac9-11e2-a7ad-52540035b04c
item.summary: conf-sanity test_32b: @@@@@@ FAIL: sha1sum verification failed

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are closed can be reopened.

comments.comment: This defect was introduced by LU-2459 patch http://review.whamcloud.com/4819 landing, which skipped test_32[ab] during testing because of IB networking (due to LU-2201), but fails 100% on TCP when the tests are actually run.
Duplicate of LU-2459
patch tracking at http://review.whamcloud.com/6121
Bobi is cooking a patch to fix it.

Looks it's caused by the fix of LU-2459 (http://review.whamcloud.com/4819), the LMA check was added in the patch, however, 2.1 LMA is much larger than 2.4 LMA, so ext4_xattr_get() failed with -ERANGE because the buffer (struct lustre_mdt_attrs of 2.4) isn't enough to hold 2.1 LMA.

Niu

Could you please look into this one as your top priority? This is causing many testing failures atm

Thanks

Peter

Note, that the reason for this issue is exceeded quota actually which is preventing test from creation of test files. sha1sum verification should fail after that of course. I wonder can this be just test cluster issue?
